◎简　　介  

　　本片讲述了，在30年代的美国，一个谋杀儿童的连环杀手Albert Fish的故事。A solid thriller about Albert Fish (a very fine performance by Patrick Bauchau), the real life serial killer of children in 1930's America. Fish seemed a harmless old man, but in 1934 he was arrested as the murderer of several missing children he somehow duped their families into leaving him with (using an assumed name throughout).
